title: BATTLEBOTS PRO LEAGUE powered by BRIGHT DATA | Official Trailer
description:
A NEW ERA OF ROBOT COMBAT
BattleBots launches Pro League powered by Bright Data

24 of the best robots in the world go head-to-head in this brand new competition format, where every fight is crucial and only the top teams in the league battle through to the final knockout rounds. There are shocks and upsets in every episode as teams from the United States, New Zealand, Australia, Canada, Brazil, UK and India converge on Las Vegas for the world’s ultimate robot combat challenge. 

You can watch the entire explosive 20-part season exclusively on the BattleBots YouTube Channel.  Episodes will stream weekly from Thursday July 2nd, available across the globe. Join millions of fans in the sport’s worldwide community – subscribe to the BattleBots Channel now to make sure you don’t miss a single episode. 

The series is sponsored by BattleBots’ Ultimate Sponsor Bright Data

title: NEW BOT THREATS ARE RISING! | BATTLEBOTS PRO LEAGUE EPISODE 3 | POWERED BY BRIGHT DATA
description:
The BattleBots Pro League powered by Bright Data rolls on with three more critical group-stage battles.

Can Ribbot remind everyone why it’s one of the most dangerous robots in the field? Will Magnitude or Disarray earn an important first victory? And can Terrortops make a statement against BattleBots veteran Valkyrie?

FIGHTS:
 • Switchback vs Ribbot
 • Disarray vs Magnitude
 • Terrortops vs Valkyrie

Every fight matters. Every point counts. And the road to the Pro League Championship is only getting tougher.

Learn More about our Ultimate Sponsor Bright Data:
https://brightdata.com/?utm_source=brand&utm_campaign=brnd-mkt_youtube_battlebots_episode

🔔 Watch free worldwide on YouTube and subscribe so you don’t miss a single fight.

🎟️ Come see BattleBots Destruct-A-Thon LIVE in Vegas:
 https://battlebots.com/tickets/
